View this post on the web at https://whyisthisinteresting.substack.com/p/witi-community-chat

Colin here. One of my resolutions for this year is to get closer to the readers of WITI. We sent stuff out, but aside from comments and likes, I feel like we are flying a bit blind. Part of what makes up this publication is the interesting people all around the world that read it and contribute. 
So, we’ll do more with subscriber chats this year. First topic is learning what people are reading/finishing for their first book of 2025. You can jump into the discussion below, and we will keep these types of dialogues running. As always, thanks for reading. 
How to get started
Get the Substack app by clicking this link [ https://substack.com/redirect/b3e8547c-4ad5-4cde-9070-45df9910f8ac?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] or the button below. New chat threads won’t be sent sent via email, so turn on push notifications so you don’t miss conversation as it happens. You can also access chat on the web [ https://open.substack.com/pub/whyisthisinteresting/chat ].
Open the app and tap the Chat icon. It looks like two bubbles in the bottom bar, and you’ll see a row for my chat inside.
That’s it! If you have any issues, check out Substack’s FAQ [ https://substack.com/redirect/72eb097f-c8ce-4933-9687-0ecbd82243cf?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ].
